docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

DECLARATION OF JACK MOEN FILED RE: AVAILIBILITT IF ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHOTO MOTION, INC.,A CALIF LEE, ROBERT E. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: NORITSU 1201 MINI PHOTO FINISHING SYSTEM, #2970367, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $1,342.41 DAMAGES, $650.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $167.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,159.91, "DAMAGES" ACTUALLY INTEREST--SEE JUDGMENT FORM
